i=s.deltaTime,n=this.prevScrollX,o=this.prevScrollY,r=this.scrollX,a=this.scrollY,l=n-r,c=o-a;this.prevScrollX=r,this.prevScrollY=a,l&&(this.backwardX=n>r),c&&(this.backwardY=o>a),this.velocity=z(i>0?Math.sqrt(l*l+c*c)/i:0,5)}}).init(),this.resizeTicker=new Vt({autoplay:!1,duration:250*$.timeScale,onComplete:()=>{this.updateWindowBounds(),this.refreshScrollObservers(),this.handleScroll()}}).init(),this.wakeTicker=new Vt({autoplay:!1,duration:500*$.timeScale,onBegin:()=>{this.scrollTicker.resume()},onComplete:()=>{this.scrollTicker.pause()}}).init(),this._head=null,this._tail=null,this.updateScrollCoords(),this.updateWindowBounds(),this.updateBounds(),this.refreshScrollObservers(),this.handleScroll(),this.resizeObserver=new ResizeObserver(()=>this.resizeTicker.restart()),this.resizeObserver.observe(this.element),(this.useWin?Gt:this.element).addEventListener("scroll",this,!1)}updateScrollCoords(){let t=this.useWin,s=this.element;this.scrollX=z(t?Gt.scrollX:s.scrollLeft,0),this.scrollY=z(t?Gt.scrollY:s.scrollTop,0)}updateWindowBounds(){this.winWidth=Gt.innerWidth,this.winHeight=mr()}updateBounds(){let t=getComputedStyle(this.element),s=this.element;this.scrollWidth=s.scrollWidth+parseFloat(t.marginLeft)+parseFloat(t.marginRight),this.scrollHeight=s.scrollHeight+parseFloat(t.marginTop)+parseFloat(t.marginBottom),this.updateWindowBounds();let i,n;if(this.useWin)i=this.winWidth,n=this.winHeight;else{let o=s.getBoundingClientRect();i=s.clientWidth,n=s.clientHeight,this.top=o.top,this.left=o.left,this.scale=o.width?i/o.width:o.height?n/o.height:1}this.width=i,this.height=n}refreshScrollObservers(){W(this,t=>{t._debug&&t.removeDebug()}),this.updateBounds(),W(this,t=>{t.refresh(),t.onResize(t),t._debug&&t.debug()})}refresh(){this.updateWindowBounds(),this.updateBounds(),this.refreshScrollObservers(),this.handleScroll()}handleScroll(){this.updateScrollCoords(),this.wakeTicker.restart()}handleEvent(t){t.type==="scroll"&&this.handleScroll()}revert(){this.scrollTicker.cancel(),this.dataTimer.cancel(),this.resizeTicker.cancel(),this.wakeTicker.cancel(),this.resizeObserver.disconnect(),(this.useWin?Gt:this.element).removeEventListener("scroll",this),zs.delete(this.element)}},gr=e=>{let t=e?Te(e)[0]||j.body:j.body,s=zs.get(t);return s||(s=new Di(t),zs.set(t,s)),s},cs=(e,t,s,i,n)=>{let currentTime(t){let s=t*($.timeScale===1?1:Ht);this.forEach(i=>{!this.persist&&s>=this.duration&&i.play(),i.currentTime=s})}get progress(){return this.currentTime/this.duration}set progress(t){this.forEach(s=>s.currentTime=t*this.duration||0)}resume(){return this.paused?(this.paused=!1,this.forEach("play")):this}pause(){return this.paused?this:(this.paused=!0,this.forEach("pause"))}alternate(){return this.reversed=!this.reversed,this.forEach("reverse"),this.paused&&this.forEach("pause"),this}play(){return this.reversed&&this.alternate(),this.resume()}reverse(){return this.reversed||this.alternate(),this.resume()}seek(t,s=!1){return s&&(this.muteCallbacks=!0),t<this.duration&&(this.completed=!1),this.currentTime=t,this.muteCallbacks=!1,this.paused&&this.pause(),this}restart(){return this.completed=!1,this.seek(0,!0).resume()}commitStyles(){return this.forEach("commitStyles")}complete(){return this.seek(this.duration)}cancel(){return this.muteCallbacks=!0,this.commitStyles().forEach("cancel"),this.animations.length=0,requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.targets.forEach(t=>{t.style.transform==="none"&&t.style.removeProperty("transform")})}),this}revert(){return r=n[o];S(r)||r===xt?i.removeProperty(Me(o)):t.style[o]=r}t.getAttribute("style")===xt&&t.removeAttribute("style")}),this}then(t=M){let s=this.then,i=()=>{this.then=null,t(this),this.then=s,this._resolve=M};return new Promise(n=>(this._resolve=()=>n(i()),this.completed&&this._resolve(),this))}},eo={animate:(e,t)=>new $i(e,t),convertEase:Ws};var Sr=0,br=0,qs=(e,t)=>!e||!t?!1:e===t||e.contains(t),Xe=e=>{if(!e)return null;let t=e.style,s=t.transition||"";return n=i.type.includes("touch"),o=i.type.includes("wheel");this.isTouching=i.type==="touchstart"||i.type==="touchmove";let r=t===0&&s===0;if(this.options.syncTouch&&n&&i.type==="touchstart"&&r&&!this.isStopped&&!this.isLocked){this.reset();return}let l=this.options.gestureOrientation==="vertical"&&s===0||this.options.gestureOrientation==="horizontal"&&t===0;if(r||l)return;let c=i.composedPath();c=c.slice(0,c.indexOf(this.rootElement));let d=this.options.prevent,m=Math.abs(t)>=Math.abs(s)?"horizontal":"vertical";if(c.find(v=>v instanceof HTMLElement&&(typeof d=="function"&&d?.(v)||v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent")||m==="vertical"&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-vertical")||m==="horizontal"&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-horizontal")||n&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-touch")||o&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-wheel")||this.options.allowNestedScroll&&this.hasNestedScroll(v,{deltaX:t,deltaY:s}))))return;if(this.isStopped||this.isLocked){i.cancelable&&i.preventDefault();return}if(!(this.options.syncTouch&&n||this.options.smoothWheel&&o)){this.isScrolling="native",this.animate.stop(),i.lenisStopPropagation=!0;return}let T=s;this.options.gestureOrientation==="both"?T=Math.abs(s)>Math.abs(t)?s:t:this.options.gestureOrientation==="horizontal"&&(T=t),(!this.options.overscroll||this.options.infinite||this.options.wrapper!==window&&this.limit>0&&(this.animatedScroll>0&&this.animatedScroll<this.limit||this.animatedScroll===0&&s>0||this.animatedScroll===this.limit&&s<0))&&(i.lenisStopPropagation=!0),i.cancelable&&i.preventDefault();let u=n&&this.options.syncTouch,f=n&&i.type==="touchend";f&&(T=Math.sign(this.velocity)*Math.abs(this.velocity)**this.options.touchInertiaExponent),this.scrollTo(this.targetScroll+T,{programmatic:!1,...u?{lerp:f?this.options.syncTouchLerp:1}:{lerp:this.options.lerp,duration:this.options.duration,easing:this.options.easing}})};resize(){this.dimensions.resize(),this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.emit()}emit(){this.emitter.emit("scroll",this)}onNativeScroll=()=>{if(this._resetVelocityTimeout!==null&&(clearTimeout(this._resetVelocityTimeout),this._resetVelocityTimeout=null),this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent){this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!1;return}if(this.isScrolling===!1||this.isScrolling==="native"){let e=this.animatedScroll;this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=this.animatedScroll-e,this.direction=Math.sign(this.animatedScroll-e),this.isStopped||(this.isScrolling="native"),this.emit(),this.velocity!==0&&(this._resetVelocityTimeout=setTimeout(()=>{this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=0,this.isScrolling=!1,this.emit()},400))}};reset(){this.isLocked=!1,this.isScrolling=!1,this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.lastVelocity=this.velocity=0,this.animate.stop()}start(){if(this.isStopped){if(this.options.autoToggle){this.rootElement.style.removeProperty("overflow");return}this.internalStart()}}internalStart(){this.isStopped&&(this.reset(),this.isStopped=!1,this.emit())}stop(){if(!this.isStopped){if(this.options.autoToggle){this.rootElement.style.setProperty("overflow","clip");return}this.internalStop()}}internalStop(){this.isStopped||(this.reset(),this.isStopped=!0,this.emit())}raf=e=>{let t=e-(this.time||e);this.time=e,this.animate.advance(t*.001),this.options.autoRaf&&(this._rafId=requestAnimationFrame(this.raf))};scrollTo(e,{offset:t=0,immediate:s=!1,lock:i=!1,programmatic:n=!0,lerp:o=n?this.options.lerp:void 0,duration:r=n?this.options.duration:void 0,easing:a=n?this.options.easing:void 0,onStart:l,onComplete:c,force:d=!1,userData:m}={}){if((this.isStopped||this.isLocked)&&!d)return;let p=e,T=t;if(typeof p=="string"&&["top","left","start","#"].includes(p))p=0;else if(typeof p=="string"&&["bottom","right","end"].includes(p))p=this.limit;else{let u=null;if(typeof p=="string"?(u=document.querySelector(p),u||(p==="#top"?p=0:console.warn("Lenis: Target not found",p))):p instanceof HTMLElement&&p?.nodeType&&(u=p),u){if(this.options.wrapper!==window){let f=this.rootElement.getBoundingClientRect();T-=this.isHorizontal?f.left:f.top}let h=u.getBoundingClientRect();p=(this.isHorizontal?h.left:h.top)+this.animatedScroll}}if(typeof p=="number"){if(p+=T,p=Math.round(p),this.options.infinite){if(n){this.targetScroll=this.animatedScroll=this.scroll;let u=p-this.animatedScroll;u>this.limit/2?p-=this.limit:u<-this.limit/2&&(p+=this.limit)}}else p=Lo(0,p,this.limit);if(p===this.targetScroll){l?.(this),c?.(this);return}if(this.userData=m??{},s){this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=p,this.setScroll(this.scroll),this.reset(),this.preventNextNativeScrollEvent(),this.emit(),c?.(this),this.userData={},requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.dispatchScrollendEvent()});return}n||(this.targetScroll=p),typeof r=="number"&&typeof a!="function"?a=Ro:typeof a=="function"&&typeof r!="number"&&(r=1),this.animate.fromTo(this.animatedScroll,p,{duration:r,easing:a,lerp:o,onStart:()=>{i&&(this.isLocked=!0),this.isScrolling="smooth",l?.(this)},onUpdate:(u,h)=>{this.isScrolling="smooth",this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=u-this.animatedScroll,this.direction=Math.sign(this.velocity),this.animatedScroll=u,this.setScroll(this.scroll),n&&(this.targetScroll=u),h||this.emit(),h&&(this.reset(),this.emit(),c?.(this),this.userData={},requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.dispatchScrollendEvent()}),this.preventNextNativeScrollEvent())}})}}preventNextNativeScrollEvent(){this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!0,requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!1})}hasNestedScroll(e,{deltaX:t,deltaY:s}){let i=Date.now();e._lenis||(e._lenis={});let n=e._lenis,o,r,a,l,c,d,m,p,T,u;if(i-(n.time??0)>2e3){n.time=Date.now();let A=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(n.computedStyle=A,o=["auto","overlay","scroll"].includes(A.overflowX),r=["auto","overlay","scroll"].includes(A.overflowY),c=["auto"].includes(A.overscrollBehaviorX),d=["auto"].includes(A.overscrollBehaviorY),n.hasOverflowX=o,n.hasOverflowY=r,!(o||r))return!1;m=e.scrollWidth,p=e.scrollHeight,T=e.clientWidth,u=e.clientHeight,a=m>T,l=p>u,n.isScrollableX=a,n.isScrollableY=l,n.scrollWidth=m,n.scrollHeight=p,n.clientWidth=T,n.clientHeight=u,n.hasOverscrollBehaviorX=c,n.hasOverscrollBehaviorY=d}else a=n.isScrollableX,l=n.isScrollableY,o=n.hasOverflowX,r=n.hasOverflowY,m=n.scrollWidth,p=n.scrollHeight,T=n.clientWidth,u=n.clientHeight,c=n.hasOverscrollBehaviorX,d=n.hasOverscrollBehaviorY;if(!(o&&a||r&&l))return!1;let h=Math.abs(t)>=Math.abs(s)?"horizontal":"vertical",f,v,w,b,_,E;if(h==="horizontal")f=Math.round(e.scrollLeft),v=m-T,w=t,b=o,_=a,E=c;else if(h==="vertical")f=Math.round(e.scrollTop),v=p-u,w=s,b=r,_=l,E=d;else return!1;return!E&&(f>=v||f<=0)?!0:(w>0?f<v:f>0)&&b&&_}get rootElement(){return this.options.wrapper===window?document.documentElement:this.options.wrapper}get limit(){return this.options.naiveDimensions?this.isHorizontal?this.rootElement.scrollWidth-this.rootElement.clientWidth:this.rootElement.scrollHeight-this.rootElement.clientHeight:this.dimensions.limit[this.isHorizontal?"x":"y"]}get isHorizontal(){return this.options.orientation==="horizontal"}get actualScroll(){let e=this.options.wrapper;return this.isHorizontal?e.scrollX??e.scrollLeft:e.scrollY??e.scrollTop}get scroll(){return this.options.infinite?Or(this.animatedScroll,this.limit):this.animatedScroll}get progress(){return this.limit===0?1:this.scroll/this.limit}get isScrolling(){return this._isScrolling}set isScrolling(e){this._isScrolling!==e&&(this._isScrolling=e,this.updateClassName())}get isStopped(){return this._isStopped}set isStopped(e){this._isStopped!==e&&(this._isStopped=e,this.updateClassName())}get isLocked(){return this._isLocked}set isLocked(e){this._isLocked!==e&&(this._isLocked=e,this.updateClassName())}get isSmooth(){return this.isScrolling==="smooth"}get className(){let e="lenis";return this.options.autoToggle&&(e+=" lenis-autoToggle"),this.isStopped&&(e+=" lenis-stopped"),this.isLocked&&(e+=" lenis-locked"),this.isScrolling&&(e+=" lenis-scrolling"),this.isScrolling==="smooth"&&(e+=" lenis-smooth"),e}updateClassName(){this.cleanUpClassName(),this.rootElement.className=`${this.rootElement.className} ${this.className}`.trim()}cleanUpClassName(){this.rootElement.className=this.rootElement.className.replace(/lenis(-\w+)?/g,"").trim()}};var ys=[],ms=new Set,ei=null,gs=!1;function Ao(){ei=new Io({infinite:!0,smoothTouch:!0,syncTouch:!0,touchMultiplier:1.5});function e(o){ei.raf(o),requestAnimationFrame(e)}requestAnimationFrame(e),ei.scrollTo(0,{immediate:!0});let t=Fi(.67,0,.27,1),s=Hi("body");if(gs){n();return}else i();console.log(gs);function i(){te({defaults:{duration:700,ease:t}}).add(".intro_title",{translateX:(r,a)=>a===0?["100%","0%"]:["-100%","0%"],duration:500,delay:250},0).add(".intro_center",{translateX:(r,a)=>{let l=r.getBoundingClientRect(),c=parseFloat(getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).fontSize)*.875;return a===0?-(l.left-c):window.innerWidth-l.right-c}},750).add(".intro",{opacity:0,duration:250})}function n(){document.querySelector(".home_list").querySelectorAll(".home_item").forEach((a,l)=>{let c=l%2===0,d=Oi({target:a,repeat:!1,onEnter:()=>{gs&&(ms.has(a)||(ms.add(a),Qt(a,{filter:["blur(20px)","blur(0px)"],duration:750,ease:t})))},onEnterBackward:()=>{gs&&(ms.has(a)||(ms.add(a),Qt(a,{filter:["blur(20px)","blur(0px)"],duration:750,ease:t})))}});ys.push(d)})}document.querySelectorAll(".home_cms--link").forEach(o=>{let r=o.querySelector(".home_flw--crs");o.addEventListener("mousemove",a=>{let l=o.getBoundingClientRect(),c=r.getBoundingClientRect(),d=c.width,m=c.height,p=8,T=8,u=Math.min(Math.max(a.clientX-l.left-p,0),Math.max(0,l.width-d)),h=Math.min(Math.max(a.clientY-l.top-T,0),Math.max(0,l.height-m));r.style.transform=`translate(${u}px, ${h}px)`}),o.addEventListener("mouseenter",()=>{Qt(r,{opacity:1,duration:800,ease:"inOut(1.68)"})}),o.addEventListener("mouseleave",()=>{Qt(r,{opacity:0,duration:800,ease:"inOut(1.68)"})})})}function zr(){ys.forEach(e=>e.revert()),ys=[],document.querySelectorAll(".home_item").forEach((e,t)=>{let s=t%2===0;e.style.clipPath=s?"inset(0% 100% 100% 0%)":"inset(0% 0% 100% 100%)"})}function ko(){ei.destroy(),gs=!0,ys.forEach(e=>e.revert()),ys=[],ms.clear(),document.querySelectorAll(".home_list:not(.is-clone) .home_item").forEach((e,t)=>{let s=t%2===0;e.style.clipPath=s?"inset(0% 100% 100% 0%)":"inset(0% 0% 100% 100%)"}),zr()}function Do(){let e=[".about_p",".about_work",".about_text",".about_social"],t=te(),s=1e3,i=10,n=0;e.forEach(T=>{Ee.$(T).forEach(u=>{let h=Oe(u,{words:{wrap:"clip"}}),f=h.words.length,v=s+i*f;T===".about_p"&&(n=v);let w=T===".about_text"||T===".about_social"?n:0;t.add(h.words,{y:["100%","0%"],duration:s,ease:"out(3)",delay:ve(i)},w).init()})});let o=document.querySelector(".section.about"),r=document.querySelector(".i-blob"),a=Pi(r,{x:{duration:800,ease:"out(3)"},y:{duration:800,ease:"out(3)"}}),l=0,c=0,d=Math.PI,m=1,p=o.getBoundingClientRect();window.addEventListener("resize",()=>p=o.getBoundingClientRect()),o.addEventListener("mousemove",T=>{let{width:u,height:h,left:f,top:v}=p,w=(T.clientX-f-u/2)*m,b=(T.clientY-v-h/2)*m;a.x(w),a.y(b)})}function Oo(){let e=[".work_title"],t=te(),s=1e3,i=10;e.forEach(u=>{Ee.$(u).forEach(h=>{let f=Oe(h,{words:{wrap:"clip"}});t.add(f.words,{y:["100%","0%"],duration:s,ease:"out(3)",delay:ve(i)},0).init()})});let n=new AbortController,{signal:o}=n,r=document.querySelectorAll(".work_item"),a=null;r.forEach(u=>{u.querySelector(".work_title")?.classList.remove("is-active");let h=u.querySelector(".work_thumb--holder"),f=u.querySelectorAll(".work_thumb");h&&(h.style.display="none"),f.forEach(v=>v.style.opacity="0")}),r.forEach(u=>{u.addEventListener("mouseover",()=>{u.classList.contains("off")||u!==a&&(a&&(a.querySelector(".work_title")?.classList.remove("is-active"),Qt(a.querySelectorAll(".work_thumb"),{opacity:0,filter:["blur(0px)","blur(20px)"],duration:300,ease:"outQuad"}),Qt(a.querySelector(".work_thumb--holder"),{display:"none",duration:0},"<")),u.querySelector(".work_title")?.classList.add("is-active"),Qt(u.querySelector(".work_thumb--holder"),{display:"flex",duration:0}),Qt(u.querySelectorAll(".work_thumb"),{opacity:1,filter:["blur(20px)","blur(0px)"],duration:300,ease:"outQuad"},"<"),a=u)},{signal:o})});let l=40;function c(u,h){return[{t:u,dist:h},{t:h+1,dist:1-u},{t:1-u+2,dist:1-h},{t:1-h+3,dist:u}].reduce((w,b)=>b.dist<w.dist?b:w).t/4}function d(u,h){u.style.animationDelay=`-${h*l}s`,u.style.animationPlayState="paused"}let m=document.querySelector(".work-g1"),p=document.querySelector(".work-g2"),T=null;document.addEventListener("mousemove",u=>{let h=u.clientX/window.innerWidth,f=u.clientY/window.innerHeight,v=c(h,f),w=(v+.5)%1;d(m,v),d(p,w),clearTimeout(T),T=setTimeout(()=>{m.style.animationPlayState="running",p.style.animationPlayState="running"},1500)})}function Fo(){let e=[".content_title",".content_desc p"],t=te(),s=1e3,i=10;e.forEach(r=>{Ee.$(r).forEach(a=>{let c=n[(a+1)%o];c.style.display="block"}}),document.querySelectorAll("video").forEach(r=>{r.muted=!0,r.playsInline=!0,r.loop=!0})}"scrollRestoration"in history&&(history.scrollRestoration="manual");function Vo(){document.querySelector("#time").textContent=new Date().toLocaleTimeString("en-GB",{timeZone:"Europe/London",hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"})}Vo();setInterval(Vo,1e3);var Ki=class extends de{onLeave({from:t,done:s}){t.animate([{opacity:1},{opacity:0}],{duration:400,easing:"ease",fill:"forwards"}).finished.then(s)}onEnter({to:t,done:s}){t.animate([{opacity:0},{opacity:1}],{duration:400,easing:"ease",fill:"forwards"}).finished.then(s)}},Gi=class extends fe{initialLoad(){this.onEnter()}onEnter(){this.content.querySelectorAll("video[autoplay]").forEach(s=>{s.play().catch(()=>{})}),document.body.scrollTop=0,document.documentElement.scrollTop=0,window.scrollTo(0,0);let t=window.location.pathname;t==="/"&&Ao(),t.includes("about")&&Do(),t.includes("/work")&&Oo(),t.includes("work/")&&Fo()}onLeaveCompleted(){window.location.pathname==="/"&&ko()}},ou=new Fe({transitions:{default:Ki},renderers:{default:Gi}});})();
